val.report 0.0.0.9007
  • Reference
    • riskmetric_scores

Generates an R Validation Hub package report

Source: R/reporter.R
package_report.Rd

Generates an R Validation Hub package report

Usage

package_report(
  package = NULL,
  session = NULL,
  options = val_options(plus = c("width")),
  template = NULL,
  output_dir = getwd(),
  quiet = FALSE,
  ...
)

Arguments

package

A package name, source code file path, url or path to an Rds file of a val.meter::pkg object . For details on accepted inputs, see val.meter::pkg.

session

A list of session information or a path to an Rds of a session object. If NULL, the session information will be derived when the package metrics are calculated. Will error if only one of package or session is provided as a Rds file.

options

Additional options to use when deriving package metrics. By default, inherits any val.* options as well as a select few global environment variables.

template

A quarto template file to use. See details for more information.

output_dir

character(1L) directory path in which rendered files should be generated. Defaults to the current working directory.

quiet

logical(1L) flag indicating whether output should be emitted to the console when rendering the report.

...

Additional arguments passed to quarto::quarto_render()

Details

This function uses a pre-built quarto extension which provides its own template document. To replace the existing template with your own without further changes, ensure that your template exposes the same parameters. Custom templates likely want to begin as a copy of the original report.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
options(
  width = 80L,
  val.meter.logs = TRUE,
  val.meter.policy = val.meter::policy(permissions = TRUE)
)

package_report(package = "path/to/package")
} # }

On this page
